error: metadata API HTTP 403: Cloudflare Error 1010 - access denied, browser signature banned by site owner

error_detail.title: Error 1010: Access denied
error_detail.detail: The site owner has blocked access based on your browser's signature.
error_detail.what_you_should_do: Do not retry. The downstream YouTube content API (Cloudflare Workers) has banned this environment's user-agent. The site owner must whitelist this worker's UA or deploy a new API endpoint.
